product_overview: BeeGym is a SaaS platform for gym owners and staff to manage students, prescriptions, and payments (PIX EFI) with a polished, high-performance UI. It covers onboarding, student CRM, workout prescription, and payment generation within a single web app.
core_goals: Allow gym owners and staff to create and access an organization account and complete onboarding
Manage student records and assign plans or contracts to students
Create and assign workouts and track prescriptions per student
Generate PIX payment requests and view payment statuses for invoices
Provide a single dashboard view for day-to-day gym operations

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users (owners and staff) to register for an account and sign in to access the application dashboard and onboarding.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See /app/painel dashboard

Navigate to /register -> Fill name, email, password and confirmPassword -> Submit registration form -> Navigate to /login -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See onboarding prompt to choose a plan
Navigate to /register -> Fill email with invalid format or fill non-matching passwords -> Submit registration form -> See validation errors for email and/or password confirmation

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Create, view and manage student profiles, addresses and plan assignments so staff can maintain a CRM of enrolled members.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/alunos -> View student list -> Start new student creation -> Fill student details including cpf, phone and full address -> Assign plan start and due dates -> Save student -> See new student listed in student list
Navigate to /app/alunos -> View student list -> Select an existing student -> Update contact or address details -> Save changes -> See updated student details
Navigate to /app/alunos -> Start new student creation -> Fill cpf with incorrect length -> Attempt to save student -> See validation error indicating cpf must be 14 characters

features.name: Workout Prescription
features.description: Allow instructors to build and assign workouts to students using the exercise library and specify sets, repetitions and cadence.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/treinos -> View students or select a student from the list -> Create new workout for the selected student -> Add exercise(s) from the exercise library -> Define sets, reps and rest/cadence details -> Save workout -> See the workout assigned to the student
Navigate to /app/treinos -> Select a student -> Create new workout -> Attempt to save without adding any exercise -> See validation error requiring at least one exercise

features.name: Payment Processing (PIX EFI)
features.description: Let staff view invoices and generate PIX QR codes / copy-and-paste payment payloads for student subscriptions and organization plan checkouts.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/pagamentos -> View list of invoices and payment statuses -> Select an outstanding invoice -> Generate PIX QR Code and copy-paste payload -> See generated QR code and copy string for payment
Navigate to /app/pagamentos -> View invoice list -> Attempt to generate PIX for an invoice with no amount or invalid amount -> See validation error preventing QR generation

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and registration flow for gym owners and staff

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Create, view and manage student profiles and plans

features.name: Workout Prescription
features.description: Assign and manage workouts for students

features.name: Payment Processing
features.description: Manage gym subscriptions and student payments through PIX EFI
